headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Downgrades Allstate to Market Perform, Lowers Price Target to $242
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   downgrades Allstate (NYSE:ALL) from Outperform to Market Perform and lowers the price target from $266 to $242.

headline: How Is Allstate's Stock Performance Compared to Other Property & Casualty Insurance Stocks?
summary: Allstate has outperformed its industry peers recently, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
